overall.description: A maritime navigation simulation from the bridge of a ship traveling at night. Three electronic displays (chart plotter, radar, and sonar) are visible overhead as the vessel moves through open water, encountering a brief lightning storm during the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with forward navigation displays

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel forward through open water while monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: leftmost screen showing nautical chart with coastline and depth contours
center display with circular radar scope and rotating sweep arm
rightmost screen showing blue sonar or depth sounder readout
illuminated bow deck of the vessel extending forward into the darkness
dark water surface visible beyond the bow with gentle wave motion

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from the enclosed bridge of a ship moving steadily through dark waters at night. Three illuminated navigation displays dominate the upper frame while the vessel's bow cuts through the calm ocean ahead. The radar sweep rotates continuously, scanning the surrounding area.

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the ocean surface on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward navigation while monitoring the storm conditions visible outside

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge lighting up the distant water surface and sky

segments.scene_description: As the ship continues its passage, a lightning storm becomes visible to starboard. A bright flash of lightning illuminates the dark ocean surface momentarily, creating a stark contrast against the night before fading back to darkness.

events.description: white navigation marker buoy becomes visible passing on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: maintaining course as the vessel passes a navigation marker in the channel

entered.detail: tall white marker pole visible briefly on the starboard side of the vessel

segments.scene_description: The storm passes as the ship continues forward, passing a white navigation marker visible on the starboard side. The vessel maintains steady progress through the water as the radar continues its sweep and the navigation displays remain active.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the enclosed bridge of a ship as it navigates through a dark night sea interrupted by a brief electrical storm. It begins with the vessel cutting through calm waters, where three illuminated navigation displays and a rotating radar sweep dominate the upper frame. As the ship maintains its course, a sudden lightning storm appears to starboard, casting a brilliant, momentary flash across the dark ocean surface before the environment fades back into deep shadow. The scene then shifts as the storm recedes, leading the camera past a white navigation marker on the starboard side. Finally, the vessel continues its steady progress through the water under the constant glow of the active electronic displays.
